qa_scores_gemini.notes: An excellent implementation featuring authentic inertial physics, screen wrapping, asteroid splitting, and even a functional UFO with basic AI and audio synthesis.

qa_scores_gpt54.notes: Playable Asteroids with inertia, wrapping, shooting, splitting asteroids, lives, waves, pause and restart, but visuals deviate from classic vector style and there are minor design/logic quirks like decorative asteroids cluttering gameplay presentation and simple UFO behavior.

qa_scores_opus.notes: Solid Asteroids implementation with inertial physics, screen wrapping, asteroid splitting, UFOs, scoring, lives, high score, pause, and sound effects; minor issues include ship drawing not scaling with the small parameter and lives display overlapping the text label.

qa_scores_gpt54.notes: Playable with thrust, rotation, shooting, splitting asteroids, lives and restart, but several logic/implementation quirks remain including ship wrap rendering issues, odd UFO behavior, and some messy collision/extra-life code.

qa_scores_gemini.notes: Excellent implementation of Asteroids with accurate inertial physics, screen wrapping, asteroid splitting, and a functional UFO with sound effects.

qa_scores_opus.notes: Core mechanics work well with ship movement, shooting, asteroid splitting, UFO spawning, wrapping, and scoring, but the collision handler is redefined in a messy way with dead code from the original function, and the extra-life tracking has redundant/conflicting logic that could cause double-awarding bugs.
